goal: Build a Python CLI tool to track PR age, review activity, and tech debt across a GitHub organization.
acceptance_criteria: Fetch all repos and PRs for a specified GitHub org using requests and the GitHub REST API v3. Handle pagination and respect rate limit headers.
Filter PRs stale > 14 days. Calculate review density = (PR comments + Issue comments) / days_open.
Generate a formatted terminal report using rich with color-coded rows.
Handle edge cases: empty org, rate limits, missing fields, invalid tokens.
All tests must pass using unittest + responses mock library.
